title: Iran War Live Updates: Trump’s Deadline Draws Closer With No Sign of Diplomatic Breakthrough
summary_full: Israel and Iran traded fresh attacks on Tuesday after President Trump said a cease-fire proposal was “not good enough.” Mr. Trump has threatened to destroy Iran’s bridges and power plants if it does not reopen the Strait of Hormuz by 8 p.m. Eastern.
